title: Error determining manifest MIME type for oci ... unexpected digest reference : invalid checksum digest format
body:
```
[person@orca1 hellohost]$ skopeo copy --format v2s2 oci:/tmp/oci-image docker-archive:/home/person/docker-image:latest              
FATA[0000] Error determining manifest MIME type for oci:/tmp/oci-image:: unexpected digest reference : invalid checksum digest format
```

```
[person@orca1 hellohost]$ umoci --version
umoci version 0.4.0+dev~git18bac7aebb090e0da0b15200c713e533309f11a3
```

```
orca1.vagrant.test:pLnextYe:XKJdgmyU# skopeo --version
skopeo version 0.1.30-dev commit: ab2bc6e8d1705c643161f6e5b354482624dc2091
```

```
[person@orca1 hellohost]$ skopeo --debug copy  --format v2s2 oci:/tmp/oci-image docker-archive:/home/person/docker-image:latest
FATA[0000] Error determining manifest MIME type for oci:/tmp/oci-image:: unexpected digest reference : invalid checksum digest format 
```

```
[person@orca1 hellohost]$ cat /tmp/oci-image/index.json
{"schemaVersion":2,"manifests":[{"mediaType":"application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json","digest":"sha256:d0ff39a54244ba25ac7447f19941765bee97b05f37ceb438a72e80c9ed39854a","size":348,"annotations":{"org.opencontainers.image.ref.name":"b957ec1de6b91b6fd0a64afbd6a81a177d476ba8f9adf2a11504716abd3ef977-src"},"platform":{"architecture":"amd64","os":"linux"}},{"mediaType":"application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json","digest":"sha256:48669a3d4dc719d3e14ba7cd61702445e7ce49d7555a4af85a6f833d6416ceed","size":349,"annotations":{"org.opencontainers.image.ref.name":"7be5d9f782cc534316dbdd70bfvi out^C9beeae9-dest"},"platform":{"architecture":"amd64","os":"linux"}}]}
```

comments.body:
Thanks for your report.

I’ll take a closer look later, for now a quick guess:
```go
			return imgspecv1.Descriptor{}, errors.Wrapf(err, "more than one image in oci, choose an image")
```
with `err == nil` `errors.Wrapf(nil, …)` returns `nil` instead of an error.

If I am right, something like `oci:/tmp/oci-image:b957ec1de6b91b6fd0a64afbd6a81a177d476ba8f9adf2a11504716abd3ef977-src` should work.

Hi, I took the liberty of doing the PR on `containers/image`, you can find it here: https://github.com/containers/image/pull/455

As @mtrmac was mentioning, wrapping a nil error causes a nil return. I've added a regression test that checks that it isn't the case anymore.
Since the PR for this issue has been merged, I will close the issue, reopen if I am mistaken.
